---
title: "Week 6 — Special Topics & Project"
subtitle: "June 22 – 26, 2026"
---

The last week. Some special topics (clustering, decision trees — instructor's choice), the second oral checkpoint, and project wrap-up. Final report and video due Friday night.

## Daily plan

| Date | Topic | Files |
|---|---|---|
| Mon Jun 22 | [**Quiz 5 (rescheduled)** · intro to clustering](day1-clustering.qmd) | quiz, slides |
| Tue Jun 23 | [Decision trees / CART (or alternative)](day2-trees.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Wed Jun 24 | **Project work day** · oral check-in #1 makeups | — |
| Thu Jun 25 | **Project work day** · oral check-in #2 (final walkthrough) | — |
| Fri Jun 26 | [**Quiz 6** · short project presentations · wrap-up](day5-presentations.qmd) | quiz |

## Readings due this week

- Before Mon: *Data Computing* Ch 18 (§18.2) — unsupervised learning, clustering
- Before Tue: *Data Computing* Ch 18 (§18.3) — trees from data

## Assignments due this week

- **Quiz 5** — Monday Jun 22 in class
- **HW 5** — due Tue Jun 23, 11:59 p.m.
- **Project Checkpoint 2** — due Wed Jun 24, 11:59 p.m.
- **Project Oral Check-in #2** — Thursday Jun 25 in class (signup on Canvas)
- **Quiz 6** — Friday Jun 26 in class
- **Final project report + video URL** — due Friday Jun 26, 11:59 p.m.

## After the course

- Final grades posted by [date TBD].
- Course evaluations: please complete them. They are read.
